package.name: fr5_quest_teleop
package.description: Quest2ROS controller teleoperation for the Fairino FR5 cobot. Subscribes to the Quest app's controller pose/inputs (via ROS-TCP-Endpoint), maps them with clutch-based delta-Cartesian control + IK, and drives the FR5 over ServoJ (Fairino SDK). Publishes /joint_states for RViz2.
